title: SGM-038 A sad female soldier who lived during the Showa era and a married woman who was made a comforter for her father-in-law Yu Kawakami - Yu Kawakami (Shizuku Morino)
description: Yu lost his family in an air raid. If I couldn't take care of my uncle forever, I ended up marrying a farmer in Ikukuma. Her husband was a quiet but gentle man who couldn't become a soldier because he was weak and worked as a record. Yu desperately lives every day in an unfamiliar environment. One day, Sanada, who became a marine with Yu's childhood friend, visited the house. That night, Yuu was told to "hold me only once before sending troops" and fell asleep with Sanada, but my father-in-law who was looking into the situation filled with evil desires. Free point gift for the first 1,000 yen!
maker: グローバルメディアエンタテインメント
